title: ASC Professional SDS Plus Hammer Masonry Drill Bit 10mm x 210mm
features: Chisel-shaped drill head for swift penetration
Suitable for masonry, granite, concrete, tiles, plastic, wood etc
description: Suitable for use in masonry, granite, concrete, tiles, plastic, wood and similar materials. Chisel-shaped drill head for swift penetration and optimal material removal. Tough carbide tip for increased durability. 2-flute design to reduce vibrations and transfer energy directly to the bit tip. Image for example purposes only. High quality. SPECIFICATIONS Quantity of Drill Bits: 1 Flute Diameter: 10mm Drill Bit Length: 210mm Shank Type: SDS Plus Check out our full range of drill bits from 1mm - 30mm diameter.
